Frequently asked questions

How many lawyers are in DeKalb County, GA?

398 lawyers and law firms across 13 cities in DeKalb County are listed here, 272 firms and 126 solo attorneys.

Which cities in DeKalb County have lawyers listed?

Decatur (190), Tucker (74), Dunwoody (43), Stone Mountain (33), Chamblee (19), Doraville (11), Lithonia (8), Clarkston (6), and more.

Who is a top rated lawyer in DeKalb County?

The JW Law Firm, LLC in Tucker is among the highest rated, with 5.0 stars across 1096 reviews.
